<!--
One concern per PR. Atomic, conventional-commit-prefixed commits.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full bar.
-->

**Why**
<!-- The motivation. The diff shows the what; explain the why. -->

**Linked issue**
<!-- Closes #123, or "none" for trivial changes. -->

**Checks**
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Updated tests for changed behavior (if it touches API contracts, sanitizer, auth, rate-limit, or depth cap)
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/`) if conventions or public behavior changed
